description: Conservative season-level editorial context for Maya Brooks. Treat as framing guidance, not standalone reportable fact.

narratives.label: Possession discipline
narratives.context: When the game data supports it, frame turnovers, rebounding, and second-chance prevention as connected possession-control themes.
risk_flags: Do not claim a season-long turnover trend from one game.
Do not assign blame to a player without direct game data.

narratives.label: Quarter-to-quarter response
narratives.context: Use quarter scoring to identify where the recap should live when one period changes the game shape.
risk_flags: Avoid calling a quarter a coaching failure without sourced reporting.

narratives.label: Frontcourt and glass
narratives.context: If the box score supports it, connect frontcourt production to rebounding, paint touches, and lineup balance.
risk_flags: Do not infer injury, fatigue, or availability reasons.
Do not claim a role change unless the game data or official source states it.
